// COMMERCIAL B2B

Bulk Vermicompost Supply by Region

For farms, distributors, nurseries, FPOs, agri-retailers, and institutional buyers looking for vermicompost aligned with local soil and crop conditions.

CROPUS Regional Bulk Storage Wireframe
// PARTNER CHANNELS

Who We Supply

CHANNEL_01

Agri Distributors

State-wide distribution partnerships with custom logistics.

CHANNEL_02

Commercial Farms

Direct-to-farm regional blends mapped to specific crops.

CHANNEL_03

Nurseries

High-purity organic compost in retail packs or large quantities.

CHANNEL_04

Organic Stores

Shelf-ready small packs with clear region-aware labeling.

CHANNEL_05

FPOs / Farmer Groups

Collective sourcing agreements for cost-effective restoration.

CHANNEL_06

Private Label Buyers

Full custom packaging and customized formula setups.

Trial bulk orders

100kg

Small farms & test programs

500kg

Commercial nurseries & local clubs

1 Ton+

FPOs, distributors & estates

Based on requirement

Custom Volume

Tailored enterprise contracts

// SUPPLY STRUCTURES

Packaging & Supply Format

Retail Packs
10kg / 25kg standard woven sacks.

Ideal for retail distribution and nurseries.

Bulk Supply
100kg / 500kg / 1T+ high-density jumbo bags.

Designed for commercial farming setups and estate storage.

Private Label
Full branding support and packing specifications.

For retail brands looking to source quality inputs.

Custom Packaging
Weatherproof liners and specialized sacks on request.

For moisture-sensitive regions and open-transit logistics.

Regional Blends
Prepared based on state target soil and crop parameters.

Tailored biological composition profiles.

// REQUEST REGIONAL DISPATCH

Regional Bulk Quote Request

Provide your enterprise logistics specifications and agricultural targets.

// COMPLIANCE FLOW

How Bulk Supply Works

STEP_01

Submit Requirement

Share state, crop, soil concern, quantity, and packaging need via our quote form.

STEP_02

Review & Quote

Agronomy and logistics teams review parameters and share customized pricing details.

STEP_03

Confirm Details

Finalize region blend specifications, packaging layout, and dispatch schedules.

STEP_04

Dispatch Coordination

Custom compost is prepared, batch-tested, and dispatched directly through dedicated routes.

CROPUSVermicompost INDIA LLP

Healthy soil begins with region-aware vermicompost. Engineered for the diverse climatic and soil profiles of India.
